Antigravity Background

Move your mouse around to see the interactive particle system in action. Particles gently move away from your cursor while maintaining connections with nearby particles.

How to Use

  1. Copy antigravity-background.js to your project
  2. Add a canvas element: <canvas id="glow-canvas"></canvas>
  3. Style it with CSS (see this page's source)
  4. Include the script: <script src="antigravity-background.js"></script>
  5. Customize colors and settings in the CONFIG section of the script
